generated_pair.question: What happens to verified AI bots if you enable both 'Block AI bots' and 'Allow verified bots' in Cloudflare?
generated_pair.answer: Verified AI bots will be blocked even if you allow other verified bots on your website or application.
supporting_sentences: The rule to block AI bots takes precedence over all other Super Bot Fight Mode rules. For example, if you have enabled Block AI bots and Allow verified bots, verified AI bots will also be blocked even if you allow other verified bots on your website or application.
